Detailed Description

Device Functionality - Linearization
System ID: 0x90

+---------------------------+------+-------------+------+-------+---------+-------------------------------------------+
| Register Name             | Id   | Type        | Unit | Range | Default | Comment                                   |
+===========================+======+=============+======+=======+=========+===========================================+
| gain                      | 0x00 |float 32-bit |None  |       |         |                                           |
+---------------------------+------+-------------+------+-------+---------+-------------------------------------------+
| offset                    | 0x01 |float 32-bit |None  |       |         |                                           |
+---------------------------+------+-------------+------+-------+---------+-------------------------------------------+
